hero.title: LIMITATION IS A STATE OF MIND
breath.title: Built for Athletes. Driven by Community.
breath.text_one: Our mission is to change life through human development and athletic performance.
breath.text_two: We combine performance, mindset, and community to support development both on and off the field.
athletes.title: Our Athletes
trainers.title: Meet Our Team
trainers.text_one: Dedicated professionals working together to support your growth.
trainers.text_two: From fitness to nutrition and mental performance specialist
diogo-description: With over 10 years of experience working with clients across different ages, backgrounds, and performance levels, Diogo has developed a distinctive approach to human development and athletic performance. From professional athletes to individuals training in various modalities, he combines technical expertise with a deep understanding of mindset, discipline, and long-term progression.
marcelo-description: Specialized in working with football players, backed by a successful professional career across multiple countries. With over 15 years of elite competitive experience, Marcelo understands the physical and mental demands of high-performance sport. After being mentored by Team Turco during his athletic career, he now brings his expertise and leadership to our professional team.
magno-occupation: Sports Nutritionist | MSc in Food, Nutrition & Health
magno-description-one: Magno is a certified nutritionist with a Master's degree in Food, Nutrition, and Health, specialized in the physiological foundations of personalized training, sports nutrition, and advanced medicine. He combines scientific depth with real-world athletic application, delivering performance-based nutritional strategies tailored to each individual.
magno-description-two: His approach integrates clinical knowledge with high-performance sport demands, ensuring every athlete receives a data-driven, individualized strategy.
jordi-quote: Strength is not only physical - it is mental.
jordi-description: Jordi supports individuals navigating anxiety, stress, emotional challenges, and personal transitions. His mission is to help you rebuild emotional stability, strengthen self-esteem, and regain control over your thoughts and decisions. Through a structured and practical approach, he transforms overwhelm into clarity and instability into strength.
charles-quote: High performance is built through science and precision.
charles-description: Charles specializes in Health & Performance Management for athletes, integrating physiotherapy, exercise physiology, and performance science into structured systems designed for elite results. With national and international experience, he delivers strategic support focused on injury prevention, recovery optimization, and competitive excellence.
ramon-quote: Peak performance begins with structured health.
ramon-description: His method integrates physiotherapy, training, recovery, and wellness into a strategic system designed to prevent injuries and optimize results. Through science-based structure and personalized follow-up, he helps athletes unlock their full physical potential.
